course_description.overview: Scenic road cycling through the Swiss pre-Alps and Gruyère cheese region, featuring challenging Alpine passes.

key_segments.name: Alpine Passes
key_segments.description: Passes reaching up to 2,800m elevation with breathtaking views.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Well-established Swiss cyclosportive with significant elevation gain through mountainous terrain, demanding strong climbing ability.

logistics.getting_there: Accessible by train to Gruyères or nearby Broc/Charmey in Fribourg region.
logistics.accommodation: Hotels and chalets available in Gruyère region; book early for events.
logistics.bike_logistics: Road bikes recommended; transport via Swiss rail network.
logistics.local_considerations: Gruyère cheese region; expect alpine weather, cowbells, and scenic chalets.

final_verdict.one_liner: Challenging alpine road sportive through cheese country and pre-Alps.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Ambitious road cyclists seeking scenic climbs in Switzerland.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for stunning scenery and classic Swiss cycling experience.
pro_tips: Use Swiss trains for access and bike transport.
Check weather; alpine conditions change rapidly.
